visa_types.full_text:
## Overview
The Bulgaria Visa Application Center submit
																		applications for short-term Schengen visas of
																		category "C" . All of the above documents are
																		mandatory for submission. An incomplete set of
																		documents is not accepted.
Submission of documents can be carried out as
																		follows:
- When applying for a visa, it is necessary to
																			submit fingerprints. Only children under the
																			age of 12 are exempt from fingerprinting.
																			All other categories of citizens, regardless
																			of whether they have previously been
																			fingerprinted or not, must go through the
																			fingerprint procedure at each submission of
																			documents.
- Foreign citizens can apply for a Bulgarian
																			visa if they legally reside in the territory
																			of the Azerbaijan temporarily or
																			permanently. In addition, foreign citizens
																			will need to confirm their legal presence in
																			the territory of the Azerbaijan with
																			additional documents.

## Visa Fees
Visa fee for Bulgarian Schengen visa
																			(visa type "С")

[Table:
																		  PARTICIPATION IN INTERNATIONAL
																		EXHIBITIONS,CONFERENCES,SYMPOSIA,SEMINARS
																	]
Agreement between the European Union and the
																			Republic of Azerbaijan on the facilitation
																			of the issuance of visas
Article 6
Fees for processing visa applications
- The fee for processing visa applications
																				shall amount to EUR 35.
- Without prejudice to paragraph 3, fees
																				for processing the visa application are
																				waived for the following categories of
																				persons:

[Table:
																		  PARTICIPATION IN INTERNATIONAL
																		EXHIBITIONS,CONFERENCES,SYMPOSIA,SEMINARS
																	]
Important: The grounds for submitting a
																				free visa application must be certified
																				by the relevant original documents - a
																				personal invitation; birth certificate
																				or marriage certificate; a certificate
																				confirming that the person is a
																				pensioner, etc.

## Documents Required
Fingerprints must be submitted when applying for
																		a visa. Only children under the age of 12 are
																		exempt from taking fingerprints. All other
																		categories of citizens, regardless of whether
																		they have previously been fingerprinted or not,
																		must necessarily undergo the procedure of
																		fingerprinting each time they submit documents.
																	
GENERAL DOCUMENTS
I. Documents to be submitted by all visa
																			applicants 
- Application form completely and clearly
																			filled in English or Russian languages.
- Passport with minimum 2 (two) blank pages.
																			Please note that the passport must be valid
																			at least 3 months upon the date of leaving
																			Schengen area. Non-citizens of Azerbaijan
																			Republic must submit copy of the residence
																			permit card for Azerbaijan and this card
																			must be valid 3 months after the date of
																			leaving Schengen area.
- Copy of the valid Azerbaijani identity card.
- Copies of the first page of the passport and
																			copies of the pages with Schengen visas and
																			arrival-departure stamps in Schengen area
																			for the last 3 years.
- One (1) photo (passport-size photos with a
																			white background) not older than 6 months of
																			3,5x4,5 sm. The photo should be sticked to
																			the application form.
- Travel insurance valid for the whole period
																			of stay on the territory of all member
																			states of Schengen area covering the costs
																			on medical prescriptions and transfer to the
																			homeland with a minimum sum of 30.000 EURO.
II. Additional documents be submitted:
- Flight or travel reservations or other proof of intended transport
A round trip booking, if applicable.
IMPORTANT: Just submit flight reservation. Flight ticket should be bought only after visa has been issued.
- Proof of accommodation
Voucher or booking from the hotel in Bulgaria clearly indicating:
- name and surname of the visa applicant;
- duration of the stay;
- contact details of the hotel.
In case of medical treatment: confirmation of stay in medical institution.
- Proof of solvency
- Original bank statements from the last 3 months; and
- certificate of real estate property or proof of other assets, that generates regular income;
- proof of pension; or
- proof of other regular income.
- Document to be provided by employees:
- A letter from the employer (in English or in Azerbaijani language with English translation) on official company paper with stamp, signature, date and clearly mentioning: address, landline telephone numbers of the employing company; the countersigning officer's name and position in the company, the name of the employee, position, salary and duration of employment.
- A letter of employment, confirmation from electronic working registration from the governmental website (
www.e-gov.az (https://www.e-gov.az/)).
- Document to be provided by company owners
- Original certificate of state registration or notarized copy of the certificate on registration (extract from state registry) and the Taxpayer Identification Number (TIN) and tax return documents.
- Document to be provided by pupils/students
- Proof of enrolment in school or university.
- Documents to be provided by minors (under 18 years of age)
- Original birth certificate and its copy for the Embassy;
- the consent of the parental authority and/or legal guardian shall be provided through an notarized certificate:
a) if the minor travels alone or only with one parent;
b) if the minor travels without his/her legal guardian;
c) if the minor is travelling with one of his/her legal guardians.
- IMPORTANT: The power of attorney from one or both of the parents should contain their signature as well of the signature and stamp of the notary. They should write in it they give permission to other person to represent them in front of the Embassy of Bulgaria and to sign on their behalf the visa application of their child. The power of attorney should be translated into English language.
- If the first name of the parent(s) and family name are different than the ones presented in the birth certificate of the minor, the parent(s) shall provide additional documents (marriage certificate(s) or adoption paper(s) or documents proving a change of given name or surname confirming the relationship of the parent(s) with the minor.
- Documents proving the applicant's intention to leave the territory of the Member States
- Proof of integration into the country of residence: family ties, professional status; or
- proof of real estate property, long term rent or lease agreement.
- Non-Azerbaijan nationals residing in Azerbaijan
- The temporary or permanent residence permit granted to the foreigner or stateless person residing in the Republic of Azerbaijan and the relevant card issued by the State Migration Service shall be valid 3 months beyond the intended date of departure from the territory of the Member States.

[Table:
																		  PARTICIPATION IN INTERNATIONAL
																		EXHIBITIONS,CONFERENCES,SYMPOSIA,SEMINARS
																	]

## Photo Specifications
General information
- Photo should be colored, full-faced and
																			without fringing.
- Photo should have been taken within the last
																			six months.
- Each applicant should submit 1 photo along
																			with visa application.
Photo size
- 35 x 45 mm with face centered in the frame
- Head (from the top of the head to the bottom
																			of the chin) should be about 30 mm.
Photo specifications
- Photo should be taken fullface with
																			applicant facing camera directly.
- Face should cover about 70-80% of the photo.
- Photo should be colored and have white or
																			light background. Photos with dark or
																			patterned background will not be accepted.
- Face should be clearly seen. It is
																			preferable to have ears open.
- Sunglasses or other accessories are not
																			acceptable unless required for medical
																			reasons (e.g. eye patch).
- Photo depicting a person wearing a
																			traditional facemask or a veil that does not
																			permit adequate identification is not
																			acceptable.
Please note:
Kindly follow the instructions above. If photos
																		provided do not correspond with the Consulate
																		requirements your application pack will be
																		considered incomplete. In case you do not have
																		an opportunity to make a photo in advance you
																		can do it in visa application center. 

## Processing Time
Dear customers, processing time may vary. The
																		approximate terms of processing are indicated
																		below. 
Processing time of visa applications:
- The minimum period for processing of visa
																				applications is 15 calendar days from
																				the date of receipt of documents to the
																				Consular Department of the Embassy.
Attention!
The day of submission of documents at the visa
																		application center is not taken into account.
																	
Calendar days mean working days and weekends. If
																		holidays or non–working days fall within the
																		processing period, it will be extended.
The Consular Department of the Embassy and visa
																		centers are closed on weekends. If the transfer
																		date or the date of receiving documents from the
																		Consular Department of the Embassy falls on the
																		weekend, then the documents will be transferred
																		/received on the next working day after the
																		weekend.
The period of processing of visa applications may
																		be extended:
As per the Article 23 of REGULATION OF THE
																		EUROPEAN PARLIAMENT AND OF THE COUNCIL
																		establishing a Community code on Visas (Visa
																		Code) the period of consideration of your visa
																		application by respective Consular authority may
																		be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days.
																	
Please note that work schedule of visa centers is
																		posted on the website in the section "Attend a
																		center". Information about possible changes in
																		the work schedule of the Consular Department of
																		the Embassy and visa centers is additionally
																		posted on the website in the "News" section.

## Download Forms
Shengen visa application form:
																		please download and fill the application
																			form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/Jpsu2NG8KudMYN61mZcvR/df4a39b845dc7ca03a8c84a5d47e69db/schengen-application-form_english-russian_072024.pdf) Form Filling - English.
You can also use the additional service of
																		filling in the application form at the Visa
																		Application Centre. Our staff will complete the
																		application form for you. You can find our
																		additional services here.

visa_types.documents_required:
Fingerprints must be submitted when applying for
																		a visa. Only children under the age of 12 are
																		exempt from taking fingerprints. All other
																		categories of citizens, regardless of whether
																		they have previously been fingerprinted or not,
																		must necessarily undergo the procedure of
																		fingerprinting each time they submit documents.
																	
GENERAL DOCUMENTS
I. Documents to be submitted by all visa
																			applicants 
- Application form completely and clearly
																			filled in English or Russian languages.
- Passport with minimum 2 (two) blank pages.
																			Please note that the passport must be valid
																			at least 3 months upon the date of leaving
																			Schengen area. Non-citizens of Azerbaijan
																			Republic must submit copy of the residence
																			permit card for Azerbaijan and this card
																			must be valid 3 months after the date of
																			leaving Schengen area.
- Copy of the valid Azerbaijani identity card.
- Copies of the first page of the passport and
																			copies of the pages with Schengen visas and
																			arrival-departure stamps in Schengen area
																			for the last 3 years.
- One (1) photo (passport-size photos with a
																			white background) not older than 6 months of
																			3,5x4,5 sm. The photo should be sticked to
																			the application form.
- Travel insurance valid for the whole period
																			of stay on the territory of all member
																			states of Schengen area covering the costs
																			on medical prescriptions and transfer to the
																			homeland with a minimum sum of 30.000 EURO.
II. Additional documents be submitted:
- Flight or travel reservations or other proof of intended transport
A round trip booking, if applicable.
IMPORTANT: Just submit flight reservation. Flight ticket should be bought only after visa has been issued.
- Proof of accommodation
Voucher or booking from the hotel in Bulgaria clearly indicating:
- name and surname of the visa applicant;
- duration of the stay;
- contact details of the hotel.
In case of medical treatment: confirmation of stay in medical institution.
- Proof of solvency
- Original bank statements from the last 3 months; and
- certificate of real estate property or proof of other assets, that generates regular income;
- proof of pension; or
- proof of other regular income.
- Document to be provided by employees:
- A letter from the employer (in English or in Azerbaijani language with English translation) on official company paper with stamp, signature, date and clearly mentioning: address, landline telephone numbers of the employing company; the countersigning officer's name and position in the company, the name of the employee, position, salary and duration of employment.
- A letter of employment, confirmation from electronic working registration from the governmental website (
www.e-gov.az (https://www.e-gov.az/)).
- Document to be provided by company owners
- Original certificate of state registration or notarized copy of the certificate on registration (extract from state registry) and the Taxpayer Identification Number (TIN) and tax return documents.
- Document to be provided by pupils/students
- Proof of enrolment in school or university.
- Documents to be provided by minors (under 18 years of age)
- Original birth certificate and its copy for the Embassy;
- the consent of the parental authority and/or legal guardian shall be provided through an notarized certificate:
a) if the minor travels alone or only with one parent;
b) if the minor travels without his/her legal guardian;
c) if the minor is travelling with one of his/her legal guardians.
- IMPORTANT: The power of attorney from one or both of the parents should contain their signature as well of the signature and stamp of the notary. They should write in it they give permission to other person to represent them in front of the Embassy of Bulgaria and to sign on their behalf the visa application of their child. The power of attorney should be translated into English language.
- If the first name of the parent(s) and family name are different than the ones presented in the birth certificate of the minor, the parent(s) shall provide additional documents (marriage certificate(s) or adoption paper(s) or documents proving a change of given name or surname confirming the relationship of the parent(s) with the minor.
- Documents proving the applicant's intention to leave the territory of the Member States
- Proof of integration into the country of residence: family ties, professional status; or
- proof of real estate property, long term rent or lease agreement.
- Non-Azerbaijan nationals residing in Azerbaijan
- The temporary or permanent residence permit granted to the foreigner or stateless person residing in the Republic of Azerbaijan and the relevant card issued by the State Migration Service shall be valid 3 months beyond the intended date of departure from the territory of the Member States.

visa_types.processing_time:
Dear customers, processing time may vary. The
																		approximate terms of processing are indicated
																		below. 
Processing time of visa applications:
- The minimum period for processing of visa
																				applications is 15 calendar days from
																				the date of receipt of documents to the
																				Consular Department of the Embassy.
Attention!
The day of submission of documents at the visa
																		application center is not taken into account.
																	
Calendar days mean working days and weekends. If
																		holidays or non–working days fall within the
																		processing period, it will be extended.
The Consular Department of the Embassy and visa
																		centers are closed on weekends. If the transfer
																		date or the date of receiving documents from the
																		Consular Department of the Embassy falls on the
																		weekend, then the documents will be transferred
																		/received on the next working day after the
																		weekend.
The period of processing of visa applications may
																		be extended:
As per the Article 23 of REGULATION OF THE
																		EUROPEAN PARLIAMENT AND OF THE COUNCIL
																		establishing a Community code on Visas (Visa
																		Code) the period of consideration of your visa
																		application by respective Consular authority may
																		be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days.
																	
Please note that work schedule of visa centers is
																		posted on the website in the section "Attend a

The Bulgaria Visa Application Center submit
																		applications for short-term Schengen visas of
																		category "C" . All of the above documents are
																		mandatory for submission. An incomplete set of
																		documents is not accepted.

																		follows:
- When applying for a visa, it is necessary to
																			submit fingerprints. Only children under the
																			age of 12 are exempt from fingerprinting.
																			All other categories of citizens, regardless
																			of whether they have previously been
																			fingerprinted or not, must go through the
																			fingerprint procedure at each submission of
																			documents.
- Foreign citizens can apply for a Bulgarian
																			visa if they legally reside in the territory
																			of the Azerbaijan temporarily or
																			permanently. In addition, foreign citizens
																			will need to confirm their legal presence in
																			the territory of the Azerbaijan with
																			additional documents.

																			(visa type "С")

## Photo Specifications
General information
- Photo should be colored, full-faced and
																			without fringing.
- Photo should have been taken within the last
																			six months.
- Each applicant should submit 1 photo along
																			with visa application.
Photo size
- 35 x 45 mm with face centered in the frame
- Head (from the top of the head to the bottom
																			of the chin) should be about 30 mm.
Photo specifications
- Photo should be taken fullface with
																			applicant facing camera directly.
- Face should cover about 70-80% of the photo.
- Photo should be colored and have white or
																			light background. Photos with dark or
																			patterned background will not be accepted.
- Face should be clearly seen. It is
																			preferable to have ears open.
- Sunglasses or other accessories are not
																			acceptable unless required for medical
																			reasons (e.g. eye patch).
- Photo depicting a person wearing a
																			traditional facemask or a veil that does not
																			permit adequate identification is not
																			acceptable.
Please note:
Kindly follow the instructions above. If photos
																		provided do not correspond with the Consulate
																		requirements your application pack will be
																		considered incomplete. In case you do not have
																		an opportunity to make a photo in advance you
																		can do it in visa application center. 

## Processing Time
Dear customers, processing time may vary. The
																		approximate terms of processing are indicated
																		below. 
Processing time of visa applications:
- The minimum period for processing of visa
																				applications is 15 calendar days from
																				the date of receipt of documents to the
																				Consular Department of the Embassy.

The day of submission of documents at the visa
																		application center is not taken into account.
																	
Calendar days mean working days and weekends. If
																		holidays or non–working days fall within the
																		processing period, it will be extended.
The Consular Department of the Embassy and visa
																		centers are closed on weekends. If the transfer
																		date or the date of receiving documents from the
																		Consular Department of the Embassy falls on the
																		weekend, then the documents will be transferred
																		/received on the next working day after the
																		weekend.
The period of processing of visa applications may
																		be extended:
As per the Article 23 of REGULATION OF THE
																		EUROPEAN PARLIAMENT AND OF THE COUNCIL
																		establishing a Community code on Visas (Visa
																		Code) the period of consideration of your visa
																		application by respective Consular authority may
																		be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days.
																	
Please note that work schedule of visa centers is
																		posted on the website in the section "Attend a
																		center". Information about possible changes in
																		the work schedule of the Consular Department of
																		the Embassy and visa centers is additionally
																		posted on the website in the "News" section.

## Download Forms
Shengen visa application form:
																		please download and fill the application
																			form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/Jpsu2NG8KudMYN61mZcvR/df4a39b845dc7ca03a8c84a5d47e69db/schengen-application-form_english-russian_072024.pdf) Form Filling - English.
You can also use the additional service of
																		filling in the application form at the Visa
																		Application Centre. Our staff will complete the
																		application form for you. You can find our
																		additional services here.

																			fingerprint procedure at each submission of
																			documents.
- Foreign citizens can apply for a Bulgarian
																			visa if they legally reside in the territory
																			of the Azerbaijan temporarily or
																			permanently. In addition, foreign citizens
																			will need to confirm their legal presence in
																			the territory of the Azerbaijan with
																			additional documents.

																				shall amount to EUR 35.

																				for processing the visa application are
																				waived for the following categories of
																				persons:

																		EVENTS]
Important: The grounds for submitting a
																				free visa application must be certified
																				by the relevant original documents - a
																				personal invitation; birth certificate
																				or marriage certificate; a certificate
																				confirming that the person is a
																				pensioner, etc.

## Documents Required
Fingerprints must be submitted when applying for
																		a visa. Only children under the age of 12 are
																		exempt from taking fingerprints. All other
																		categories of citizens, regardless of whether
																		they have previously been fingerprinted or not,
																		must necessarily undergo the procedure of
																		fingerprinting each time they submit documents.
																	
GENERAL DOCUMENTS
I. Documents to be submitted by all visa
																			applicants 
- Application form completely and clearly
																			filled in English or Russian languages.
- Passport with minimum 2 (two) blank pages.
																			Please note that the passport must be valid
																			at least 3 months upon the date of leaving
																			Schengen area. Non-citizens of Azerbaijan
																			Republic must submit copy of the residence
																			permit card for Azerbaijan and this card
																			must be valid 3 months after the date of
																			leaving Schengen area.
- Copy of the valid Azerbaijani identity card.
- Copies of the first page of the passport and
																			copies of the pages with Schengen visas and
																			arrival-departure stamps in Schengen area
																			for the last 3 years.
- One (1) photo (passport-size photos with a
																			white background) not older than 6 months of
																			3,5x4,5 sm. The photo should be sticked to
																			the application form.
- Travel insurance valid for the whole period
																			of stay on the territory of all member
																			states of Schengen area covering the costs
																			on medical prescriptions and transfer to the
																			homeland with a minimum sum of 30.000 EURO.
II. Additional documents be submitted:
- Flight or travel reservations or other proof of intended transport
A round trip booking, if applicable.
IMPORTANT: Just submit flight reservation. Flight ticket should be bought only after visa has been issued.
- Proof of accommodation
Voucher or booking from the hotel in Bulgaria clearly indicating:
- name and surname of the visa applicant;
- duration of the stay;
- contact details of the hotel.
In case of medical treatment: confirmation of stay in medical institution.
- Proof of solvency
- Original bank statements from the last 3 months; and
- certificate of real estate property or proof of other assets, that generates regular income;
- proof of pension; or
- proof of other regular income.
- Document to be provided by employees:
- A letter from the employer (in English or in Azerbaijani language with English translation) on official company paper with stamp, signature, date and clearly mentioning: address, landline telephone numbers of the employing company; the countersigning officer's name and position in the company, the name of the employee, position, salary and duration of employment.
- A letter of employment, confirmation from electronic working registration from the governmental website (
www.e-gov.az (https://www.e-gov.az/)).
- Document to be provided by company owners
- Original certificate of state registration or notarized copy of the certificate on registration (extract from state registry) and the Taxpayer Identification Number (TIN) and tax return documents.
- Document to be provided by pupils/students
- Proof of enrolment in school or university.
- Documents to be provided by minors (under 18 years of age)
- Original birth certificate and its copy for the Embassy;
- the consent of the parental authority and/or legal guardian shall be provided through an notarized certificate:
a) if the minor travels alone or only with one parent;
b) if the minor travels without his/her legal guardian;
c) if the minor is travelling with one of his/her legal guardians.
- IMPORTANT: The power of attorney from one or both of the parents should contain their signature as well of the signature and stamp of the notary. They should write in it they give permission to other person to represent them in front of the Embassy of Bulgaria and to sign on their behalf the visa application of their child. The power of attorney should be translated into English language.
- If the first name of the parent(s) and family name are different than the ones presented in the birth certificate of the minor, the parent(s) shall provide additional documents (marriage certificate(s) or adoption paper(s) or documents proving a change of given name or surname confirming the relationship of the parent(s) with the minor.
- Documents proving the applicant's intention to leave the territory of the Member States
- Proof of integration into the country of residence: family ties, professional status; or
- proof of real estate property, long term rent or lease agreement.
- Non-Azerbaijan nationals residing in Azerbaijan
- The temporary or permanent residence permit granted to the foreigner or stateless person residing in the Republic of Azerbaijan and the relevant card issued by the State Migration Service shall be valid 3 months beyond the intended date of departure from the territory of the Member States.

[Table:  SPORT
																		EVENTS]

## Photo Specifications
General information
- Photo should be colored, full-faced and
																			without fringing.
- Photo should have been taken within the last
																			six months.
- Each applicant should submit 1 photo along
																			with visa application.
Photo size
- 35 x 45 mm with face centered in the frame
- Head (from the top of the head to the bottom
																			of the chin) should be about 30 mm.
Photo specifications
- Photo should be taken fullface with
																			applicant facing camera directly.
- Face should cover about 70-80% of the photo.
- Photo should be colored and have white or
																			light background. Photos with dark or
																			patterned background will not be accepted.
- Face should be clearly seen. It is
																			preferable to have ears open.
- Sunglasses or other accessories are not
																			acceptable unless required for medical
																			reasons (e.g. eye patch).
- Photo depicting a person wearing a
																			traditional facemask or a veil that does not
																			permit adequate identification is not
																			acceptable.
Please note:
Kindly follow the instructions above. If photos
																		provided do not correspond with the Consulate
																		requirements your application pack will be
																		considered incomplete. In case you do not have
																		an opportunity to make a photo in advance you
																		can do it in visa application center. 

## Processing Time
Dear customers, processing time may vary. The
																		approximate terms of processing are indicated
																		below. 
Processing time of visa applications:
- The minimum period for processing of visa
																				applications is 15 calendar days from
																				the date of receipt of documents to the
																				Consular Department of the Embassy.
Attention!
The day of submission of documents at the visa
																		application center is not taken into account.
																	
Calendar days mean working days and weekends. If
																		holidays or non–working days fall within the
																		processing period, it will be extended.
The Consular Department of the Embassy and visa
																		centers are closed on weekends. If the transfer
																		date or the date of receiving documents from the
																		Consular Department of the Embassy falls on the
																		weekend, then the documents will be transferred
																		/received on the next working day after the
																		weekend.
The period of processing of visa applications may
																		be extended:
As per the Article 23 of REGULATION OF THE
																		EUROPEAN PARLIAMENT AND OF THE COUNCIL
																		establishing a Community code on Visas (Visa
																		Code) the period of consideration of your visa
																		application by respective Consular authority may
																		be extended up to a maximum of 45 calendar days.
																	
Please note that work schedule of visa centers is
																		posted on the website in the section "Attend a
																		center". Information about possible changes in
																		the work schedule of the Consular Department of
																		the Embassy and visa centers is additionally
																		posted on the website in the "News" section.

## Download Forms
Shengen visa application form:
																		please download and fill the application
																			form (https://assets.ctfassets.net/xxg4p8gt3sg6/Jpsu2NG8KudMYN61mZcvR/df4a39b845dc7ca03a8c84a5d47e69db/schengen-application-form_english-russian_072024.pdf) Form Filling - English.
You can also use the additional service of
																		filling in the application form at the Visa
																		Application Centre. Our staff will complete the
																		application form for you. You can find our
																		additional services here.

## Photo Specifications
General information
- Photo should be colored, full-faced and without
																fringing.
- Photo should have been taken within the last six months.
- Each applicant should submit 1 photo along with visa
																application.
Photo size
- 35 x 45 mm with face centered in the frame
- Head (from the top of the head to the bottom of the
																chin) should be about 30 mm.
Photo specifications
- Photo should be taken fullface with applicant facing
																camera directly.
- Face should cover about 70-80% of the photo.
- Photo should be colored and have white or light
																background. Photos with dark or patterned background
																will not be accepted.
- Face should be clearly seen. It is preferable to have
																ears open.
- Sunglasses or other accessories are not acceptable
																unless required for medical reasons (e.g. eye patch).
- Photo depicting a person wearing a traditional facemask
																or a veil that does not permit adequate identification
																is not acceptable.
Please note:
Kindly follow the instructions above. If photos provided do
															not correspond with the Consulate requirements your
															application pack will be considered incomplete. In case you
															do not have an opportunity to make a photo in advance you
															can do it in visa application center.
